def negative_constructor_performs_real_work_beyond_state_initialization():
    rule_id = "constructor_performs_real_work_beyond_state_initialization"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag constructors that do heavy work instead of leaving execution to explicit methods."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
